message.content:
Read lenses/RBS0-SpecTop.adoc and:
1. Find ALL existing rbtgo_* definitions (operation linked terms) — list each one with its line number and definition text
2. Identify what entity/role each operation relates to (depot, ark, image, payor, governor, sa, rubric, access, etc.)
3. Note the document structure — where are operations defined relative to other content?
4. Check if any rbtgog_* (group) terms already exist
5. Look for the axvo_group voicing pattern or any existing group annotations

Return a complete inventory organized by likely group.

content.text: I'll read the RBS0-SpecTop.adoc file to find all existing rbtgo_* definitions and analyze the document structure.

686→== {rbtr_payor} Operations
   687→
   688→[[rbtgo_payor_establish]]
   689→// ⟦axl_voices axo_guide axe_human_guide⟧

   693→
   694→[[rbtgo_payor_install]]
   695→// ⟦axl_voices axo_command axe_bash_interactive⟧
   696→=== {rbtgo_payor_install}
   697→
   698→Completes OAuth credential installation by performing authorization flow, storing credentials, and validating payor project access.
   699→
   700→include::RBSPI-payor_install.adoc[]
   701→
   702→[[rbtgo_payor_refresh]]
   703→// ⟦axl_voices axo_guide axe_human_guide⟧
   704→=== {rbtgo_payor_refresh}
   705→
   706→include::RBSPR-payor_refresh.adoc[]
   707→
   708→[[rbtgo_access_oauth_probe]]
   709→// ⟦axl_voices axo_command axe_bash_interactive⟧
   710→=== {rbtgo_access_oauth_probe}
   711→
   712→Probes Payor OAuth access by refreshing the stored OAuth token and calling the Cloud Resource Manager projects.get API, with optional iteration and delay for sustained verification.
   713→
   714→include::RBSAO-access_oauth_probe.adoc[]
   715→
   716→[[rbtgo_depot_create]]
   717→// ⟦axl_voices axo_command axe_bash_interactive⟧
   718→=== {rbtgo_depot_create}
   719→
   720→Creates depot infrastructure (project, bucket, repository, Mason service account).
   721→
   722→include::RBSDC-depot_create.adoc[]
   723→
   724→[[rbtgo_depot_initialize]]
   725→// ⟦axl_voices axo_guide axe_human_guide⟧
   726→=== {rbtgo_depot_initialize}
   727→
   728→Completes one-time depot initialization (after
   729→{rbtgo_governor_reset}
   730→has been run): validates the
   731→{rbra_rubric_repo_url}
   732→and guides the
   733→{at_operator}
   734→through Developer Connect GitHub OAuth authorization.
   735→
   736→include::RBSDN-depot_initialize.adoc[]
   737→
   738→[[rbtgo_depot_destroy]]
   739→// ⟦axl_voices axo_command axe_bash_interactive⟧
   740→=== {rbtgo_depot_destroy}
   741→
   742→include::RBSDD-depot_destroy.adoc[]
   743→
   744→[[rbtgo_depot_list]]
   745→// ⟦axl_voices axo_command axe_bash_interactive⟧
   746→=== {rbtgo_depot_list}
   747→
   748→include::RBSDL-depot_list.adoc[]
   749→
   750→[[rbtgo_quota_build]]
   751→// ⟦axl_voices axo_guide axe_human_guide⟧
   752→=== {rbtgo_quota_build}
   753→
   754→Reviews machine type and CPU quota alignment to enable the desired level of parallel build execution.
   755→
   756→include::RBSQB-quota_build.adoc[]
   757→
   758→[[rbtgo_governor_reset]]
   759→// ⟦axl_voices axo_command axe_bash_interactive⟧
   760→=== {rbtgo_governor_reset}
   761→
   762→include::RBSGR-governor_reset.adoc[]

   765→

   767→// ⟦axl_voices axo_command axe_bash_interactive⟧
   768→=== {rbtgo_retriever_create}
   769→
   770→include::RBSRC-retriever_create.adoc[]
   771→
   772→[[rbtgo_director_create]]
   773→// ⟦axl_voices axo_command axe_bash_interactive⟧
   774→=== {rbtgo_director_create}
   775→
   776→include::RBSDI-director_create.adoc[]
   777→
   778→== {rbtr_director} Operations
   779→
   780→[[rbtgo_gdc_establish]]
   781→// ⟦axl_voices axo_guide axe_human_guide⟧
   782→=== {rbtgo_gdc_establish}
   783→
   784→Legacy reference for
   785→{rbtgi_source_connection}
   786→establishment.
   787→This operation has been split: connection creation is automated in
   788→{rbtgo_depot_create},
   789→OAuth authorization is guided by
   790→{rbtgo_depot_initialize}.
   791→
   792→include::RBSGD-gdc_establish.adoc[]
   793→
   794→[[rbtgo_rubric_inscribe]]
   795→// ⟦axl_voices axo_command axe_bash_interactive⟧
   796→=== {rbtgo_rubric_inscribe}
   797→
   798→The batch-all-vessels rubric lifecycle command: refreshes pins (rate-limited to 1/day),
   799→generates all
   800→{rbtgr_build_json}
   801→files from step scripts and regime pins, copies all build contexts,
   802→verifies committed in main repo, syncs all to
   803→{rbtgr_rubric_repo},
   804→and ensures all
   805→{rbtgr_vessel_trigger}
   806→resources exist.
   807→
   808→include::RBSRI-rubric_inscribe.adoc[]
   809→
   810→[[rbtgo_trigger_build]]
   811→// ⟦axl_voices axo_command axe_bash_interactive⟧
   812→=== {rbtgo_trigger_build}
   813→
   814→Dispatches a build via `triggers.run` using the vessel's
   815→{rbtgr_vessel_trigger}.
   816→All values baked in
   817→{rbtgr_build_json}
   818→— zero custom substitution overrides.
   819→
   820→include::RBSTB-trigger_build.adoc[]
   821→
   822→NOTE: For multi-platform build authentication challenges and research findings, see link:RBWMBX-BuildxMultiPlatformAuth.adoc[RBWMBX: Buildx Multi-Platform Authentication Memo].
   823→
   824→[[rbtgo_image_list]]
   825→// ⟦axl_voices axo_command axe_bash_interactive⟧
   826→=== {rbtgo_image_list}
   827→
   828→include::RBSIL-image_list.adoc[]
   829→
   830→[[rbtgo_image_delete]]
   831→// ⟦axl_voices axo_command axe_bash_interactive⟧
   832→=== {rbtgo_image_delete}
   833→
   834→include::RBSID-image_delete.adoc[]
   835→
   836→[[rbtgo_ark_abjure]]
   837→// ⟦axl_voices axo_command axe_bash_interactive⟧
   838→=== {rbtgo_ark_abjure}
   839→
   840→Formally renounces an ark from the repository, removing both its image and about artifacts as a coherent unit.
   841→
   842→include::RBSAA-ark_abjure.adoc[]
   843→
   844→[[rbtgo_ark_beseech]]
   845→// ⟦axl_voices axo_command axe_bash_interactive⟧
   846→=== {rbtgo_ark_beseech}
   847→
   848→Petitions the registry to reveal its consecrated arks, correlating artifact pairs by shared consecration timestamp.
   849→
   850→include::RBSAB-ark_beseech.adoc[]
   851→
   852→[[rbtgo_ark_conjure]]
   853→// ⟦axl_voices axo_command axe_bash_interactive⟧
   854→=== {rbtgo_ark_conjure}
   855→
   856→Conjures an ark by building a container image from a vessel specification and storing both image and about artifacts in the repository.
   857→
   858→include::RBSAC-ark_conjure.adoc[]
   859→
   860→== {rbtr_retriever} Operations
   861→
   862→[[rbtgo_image_retrieve]]
   863→// ⟦axl_voices axo_command axe_bash_interactive⟧
   864→=== {rbtgo_image_retrieve}
   865→
   866→include::RBSIR-image_retrieve.adoc[]
   867→
   868→[[rbtgo_ark_summon]]
   869→// ⟦axl_voices axo_command axe_bash_interactive⟧
   870→=== {rbtgo_ark_summon}
   871→
   872→Summons an ark from the repository, retrieving both its image and about artifacts to the local container runtime.

   887→
